site.title: FurinaKit Toolbox
site.subtitle: Elegant Online Toolbox
site.description: Free online tools for PDF, image, text, audio & video processing
tools.coming_soon.desc: Tools for this category are under development. Stay tuned!
dropzone.text: Drop files here or click to browse
tool.pdf-merge.desc: Merge multiple PDF files into one
tool.text-diff.desc: Compare two texts and show differences
tool.perler-beads.desc: Upload image to generate perler bead pattern
tool.css-gradient.desc: Generate CSS gradient code (linear, radial, conic)
tool.cron-parser.desc: Parse cron expression and show execution times
tool.csv-to-excel.desc: Convert CSV file to Excel format
tool.perler-beads.help:
Steps:
1. Upload image (JPG/PNG/WebP supported)
2. Choose grid size (15/29/58/100 or custom height)
3. Select palette brand and colors
4. Adjust preprocessing (contrast, saturation, etc.)
5. Click generate, download pattern and shopping list

Pixelation Modes:
- Dominant: most frequent color, best for cartoon style
- Average: averaged color, best for realistic style
- Dark First: prioritizes dark pixels, best for outlines

Color Matching Algorithms:
- OkLab: perceptually uniform color space, visually similar colors are close, recommended
- RGB Euclidean: fast but less accurate to human perception
- CIEDE2000: most accurate algorithm, but implementation is incomplete

Tips:
- Larger grid = more detail but harder to build
- Enable dithering for smoother color transitions
- Exclude colors you don't want
tool.json-format.help:
Steps:
1. Paste JSON text
2. Choose indent spaces
3. Click execute

Features:
- Beautify: format with indentation
- Minify: remove extra spaces
- Tree view: visualize JSON structure
tool.text-diff.help:
Steps:
1. Enter old text
2. Enter new text
3. Choose comparison mode (lines/words/chars)
4. Click execute

Result:
- Green: added content
- Red: removed content
- Gray: unchanged
tool.regex-tester.help:
Steps:
1. Enter regex pattern
2. Enter text to match
3. Choose flags (g/gi/gm/gim)
4. View matches in real-time

Features:
- Highlighted matches
- Capture groups shown
- Live preview
tool.pdf-compress.help:
Steps:
1. Upload PDF file
2. Choose compression quality (low/medium/high)
3. Click execute
4. Download compressed file

Compression levels:
- Low: minimal, keep everything
- Medium: balanced, clean metadata
- High: maximum, remove annotations
tool.image-compress.help:
Steps:
1. Upload image
2. Choose quality (1-100)
3. Choose output format (JPEG/WebP/PNG)
4. Click execute
5. View size comparison

Tips:
- JPEG: best for photos, small size
- PNG: best for icons, lossless
- WebP: good compatibility, smallest size
tool.base64.help:
Steps:
1. Enter text or upload file
2. Choose operation (encode/decode)
3. Click execute

Notes:
- Encode: convert text/file to Base64 string
- Decode: restore Base64 string to text/file
tool.hash.help:
Steps:
1. Enter text or upload file
2. Choose algorithm (MD5/SHA1/SHA256/SHA384/SHA512)
3. Click execute

Notes:
- Hash is one-way encryption, cannot be reversed
- Commonly used for file integrity verification
tool.url-encode.help:
Steps:
1. Enter URL or text
2. Choose operation (encode/decode)
3. Choose encoding type (component/full URL)
4. Click execute

Notes:
- Encode: convert special characters to URL-safe format
- Decode: restore encoded URL
tool.uuid-gen.help:
Steps:
1. Set quantity
2. Auto-generate UUID v4

Notes:
- UUID is a universally unique identifier
- Commonly used for database keys, session IDs
tool.password-gen.help:
Steps:
1. Set password length
2. Set quantity
3. Choose character types (uppercase/lowercase/numbers/symbols)
4. Auto-generate

Tips:
- Recommended length: at least 12 characters
- Multiple character types = more secure
tool.qrcode-gen.help:
Steps:
1. Enter text or URL
2. Choose format (PNG/SVG/terminal)
3. Set size
4. Choose error correction level
5. Live preview

Error correction levels:
- L (7%): smallest size
- M (15%): default
- Q (25%): medium
- H (30%): highest
tool.color-convert.help:
Steps:
1. Use color picker
2. Or enter color value directly
3. Choose source and target formats
4. Auto-convert

Supported formats:
- HEX: #FF5733
- RGB: rgb(255, 87, 51)
- HSL: hsl(14, 100%, 60%)
tool.pdf-merge.help:
Steps:
1. Upload multiple PDF files
2. Drag to reorder
3. Click execute
4. Download merged file

Tips:
- Upload multiple files at once
- Merges in upload order
tool.pdf-split.help:
Steps:
1. Upload PDF file
2. Enter page numbers (e.g., 1,3,5-10)
3. Click execute
4. Download extracted pages

Page format:
- Single: 1, 3, 5
- Range: 1-10
- Mixed: 1,3,5-10
tool.pdf-delete-pages.help:
Steps:
1. Upload PDF file
2. Enter pages to delete (e.g., 1,3,5-10)
3. Click execute
4. Download result

Page format:
- Single: 1, 3, 5
- Range: 1-10
- Mixed: 1,3,5-10
tool.pdf-rotate.help:
Steps:
1. Upload PDF file
2. Choose rotation angle (90°/180°/270°)
3. Optional: specify pages
4. Click execute
5. Download rotated file
tool.pdf-to-image.help:
Steps:
1. Upload PDF file
2. Specify page number
3. Choose format (PNG/JPEG/WebP)
4. Set scale ratio
5. Click execute
6. Download image
tool.pdf-extract-pages.help:
Steps:
1. Upload PDF file
2. Enter page range
3. Click execute
4. Download extracted pages

Page format: 1,3,5-10
tool.image-resize.help:
Steps:
1. Upload image
2. Enter target width and height
3. Click execute
4. Download resized image

Tips:
- Supports JPG/PNG/WebP/GIF
- Keep aspect ratio by filling one dimension
tool.image-crop.help:
Steps:
1. Upload image
2. Use visual selector to crop area
3. Or enter crop parameters manually
4. Click execute
5. Download cropped image
tool.image-convert.help:
Steps:
1. Upload image
2. Choose target format (JPEG/PNG/WebP/AVIF)
3. Optional: set quality
4. Click execute
5. Download converted image
tool.image-rotate.help:
Steps:
1. Upload image
2. Choose rotation angle (90°/180°/270°)
3. Optional: horizontal/vertical flip
4. Click execute
5. Download rotated image
tool.image-merge.help:
Steps:
1. Upload multiple images
2. Choose direction (horizontal/vertical)
3. Set background color
4. Click execute
5. Download merged image
tool.image-add-watermark.help:
Steps:
1. Upload image
2. Enter watermark text
3. Choose position (center/bottom-right/bottom-left/top-right/top-left)
4. Set opacity, font size, color
5. Click execute
6. Download watermarked image
tool.video-to-audio.help:
Steps:
1. Upload video file
2. Choose format (MP3/WAV/AAC/OGG)
3. Set quality (1-100)
4. Click execute
5. Download audio file
tool.video-compress.help:
Steps:
1. Upload video file
2. Choose quality (low/medium/high)
3. Optional: set max width
4. Click execute
5. Download compressed video

Tips:
- Processing may take minutes
- Timeout limit: 5 minutes
tool.video-trim.help:
Steps:
1. Upload video file
2. Set start time (HH:MM:SS)
3. Set end time or duration
4. Click execute
5. Download trimmed video
tool.file-info.help:
Steps:
1. Upload file
2. Auto-display file info

Shows:
- Filename, size, type
- Created/modified time
- Metadata (if any)
tool.file-hash.help:
Steps:
1. Upload file
2. Choose algorithm (MD5/SHA1/SHA256/SHA512)
3. Click execute
4. Display file hash
tool.text-case.help:
Steps:
1. Enter text
2. Choose target format
3. Auto-convert

Supported formats:
- Upper/Lower case
- Title/Sentence case
- Camel/Pascal case
- Snake/Kebab case
tool.text-count.help:
Steps:
1. Enter text
2. Auto-count

Counts:
- Characters/Words
- Lines/Sentences
- Paragraphs
tool.markdown-to-html.help:
Steps:
1. Enter Markdown text
2. Live HTML preview
3. Choose options (GFM/line breaks)
4. Click execute
5. Copy or download HTML
tool.jwt-decode.help:
Steps:
1. Paste JWT Token
2. Auto-decode
3. Show Header and Payload

Notes:
- JWT is JSON Web Token
- Does not verify signature, only decodes
tool.timestamp.help:
Steps:
1. Enter timestamp or date
2. Choose conversion mode
3. Auto-convert

Supported formats:
- Unix timestamp
- ISO 8601
- Localized format
perler.preprocess_hint: Preprocessing done, click "Generate Pattern" to see result
perler.exclude_hint: Check colors you don't want to use, then regenerate
perler.edit_hint: Click on grid cells to change color
tool.file_result: Result is a file. Click below to download.
val.title: Title Case
uploader.drop_text: Drop files here or click to browse
opt.position.desc: Position of page numbers on the page
opt.end_time.desc: Format: HH:MM:SS (optional, mutually exclusive with duration)
opt.duration.desc: Format: HH:MM:SS (optional, mutually exclusive with end time)
term.base64: An encoding method commonly used for data transfer
term.jwt: JSON Web Token, a token used for authentication
term.uuid: Universally Unique Identifier, used to generate unique IDs
term.regex: Regular Expression, used for text pattern matching
term.hash: Hash/Digest, converts data to a fixed-length value
term.sha256: Secure Hash Algorithm, generates 256-bit hash values
term.md5: Message Digest Algorithm, generates 128-bit hash values
term.crc: Cyclic Redundancy Check, used to detect data transmission errors
term.qr_code: Quick Response Code, can store text or URL information
term.csv: Comma-Separated Values, a common tabular data format
term.xml: Extensible Markup Language, used for storing and transmitting data
term.markdown: A lightweight markup language commonly used for documentation
term.gfm: GitHub Flavored Markdown, supports tables, task lists, and other extensions
term.floyd_steinberg: An image dithering algorithm that reduces color count while preserving visual quality
tool.qr_input_placeholder: Enter text or URL to generate QR code...
recent.title: Recent Tools
tool.audio-trim.desc: Trim audio to specified time range
tool.image-to-pdf.desc: Convert images to a single PDF file
tool.excel-to-csv.desc: Convert Excel file to CSV format
opt.indent.desc: Number of spaces per indent level
opt.sentencesPerParagraph.desc: Number of sentences in each paragraph (1-20)
tool.pdf-encrypt.help:
Steps:
1. Upload PDF file
2. Set open password (required)
3. Optionally set permission password (restrict print/edit)
4. Click execute
5. Download encrypted PDF

Parameters:
• Open password: required to open the file
• Permission password: restricts printing, copying, editing

Tips:
• Keep your password safe — lost passwords cannot be recovered
• Uses AES-256 encryption
tool.pdf-watermark.help:
Steps:
1. Upload PDF file
2. Enter watermark text
3. Adjust font size, color, and opacity
4. Choose position and rotation angle
5. Click execute

Parameters:
• Text: watermark content
• Font size: text size
• Opacity: transparency level (10-30% recommended)
• Rotation: text tilt angle

Tips:
• Watermark overlays page content
• Applied to every page
tool.pdf-add-page-numbers.help:
Steps:
1. Upload PDF file
2. Choose page number position (bottom center/left/right)
3. Set starting page number
4. Optionally set font size and format
5. Click execute

Parameters:
• Position: where page numbers appear
• Start number: first page number
• Format: "1", "Page 1", "1/N", etc.

Tips:
• Numbers added to page bottom
• Can skip cover page
tool.image-to-ico.help:
Steps:
1. Upload image (PNG, JPG, etc.)
2. Select icon sizes (16×16 to 256×256)
3. Click execute
4. Download ICO file

Parameters:
• Sizes: resolutions to include in the ICO file

Tips:
• Square images work best
• Max 256×256 pixels
• Transparent PNG recommended
tool.image-to-pdf.help:
Steps:
1. Upload one or more images
2. Drag to reorder
3. Choose page size and orientation
4. Click execute
5. Download generated PDF

Parameters:
• Page size: A4, Letter, etc.
• Orientation: portrait or landscape
• Fit mode: fit to page or original size

Tips:
• Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP
• One image per page in order
tool.image-to-base64.help:
Steps:
1. Upload image file
2. Choose whether to add Data URI prefix
3. Click execute
4. Copy the Base64 string

Parameters:
• Data URI prefix: add for direct use in HTML img src

Tips:
• Base64 encoding increases size by ~33%
• Best for small images embedded in HTML/CSS
tool.base64-to-image.help:
Steps:
1. Paste Base64 encoded string
2. Format is auto-detected
3. Click execute
4. Download the image file

Parameters:
• Input: with or without Data URI prefix

Tips:
• Input must be valid Base64
• Output matches original format (PNG/JPG/GIF)
tool.json-to-csv.help:
Steps:
1. Paste JSON array data
2. Choose delimiter (comma/tab/semicolon)
3. Optionally select fields to export
4. Click execute
5. Copy or download CSV

Parameters:
• Delimiter: column separator
• Fields: columns to include (all if empty)

Tips:
• Input must be a JSON array
• Nested objects are flattened with dot notation
tool.csv-to-json.help:
Steps:
1. Paste CSV text or upload file
2. Choose delimiter
3. Toggle first row as headers
4. Click execute

Parameters:
• Delimiter: column separator
• First row as headers: use first row as JSON keys
• Encoding: character encoding (UTF-8, GBK)

Tips:
• Each row becomes a JSON object
• Numbers are auto-detected
tool.json-to-yaml.help:
Steps:
1. Paste JSON text
2. Choose indent spaces (2 or 4)
3. Click execute
4. Copy generated YAML

Parameters:
• Indent: spaces per nesting level (2 recommended for YAML)

Tips:
• Input must be valid JSON
• Special characters are auto-quoted
tool.json-to-xml.help:
Steps:
1. Paste JSON text
2. Set root element name
3. Choose indentation
4. Click execute
5. Copy generated XML

Parameters:
• Root element: XML root tag name
• Indent: spaces per nesting level

Tips:
• JSON arrays become repeated child elements
• Special characters in keys are escaped
tool.markdown-to-pdf.help:
Steps:
1. Paste or write Markdown text
2. Choose page size and orientation
3. Optionally select a theme
4. Click execute
5. Download PDF file

Parameters:
• Page size: A4, Letter, etc.
• Orientation: portrait or landscape
• Theme: layout style and colors

Tips:
• Supports standard Markdown and GFM
• Tables, code highlighting, images supported
tool.sql-format.help:
Steps:
1. Paste SQL statement
2. Choose keyword case (upper/lower/unchanged)
3. Choose indentation
4. Click execute

Parameters:
• Keyword case: capitalize SELECT, FROM, etc.
• Indent: spaces for subqueries
• One field per line: format SELECT fields

Tips:
• Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server
• Does not change SQL semantics
tool.css-format.help:
Steps:
1. Paste CSS code
2. Choose indent style (spaces or tab)
3. Choose brace style
4. Click execute

Parameters:
• Indent: 2 or 4 spaces, or tab
• Property per line: each CSS property on its own line

Tips:
• Supports all CSS3 features
• Supports @media, @keyframes, etc.
• Comments are preserved
tool.js-format.help:
Steps:
1. Paste JavaScript code
2. Choose indent style (spaces or tab)
3. Toggle semicolons
4. Click execute

Parameters:
• Indent: 2 or 4 spaces, or tab
• Semicolons: add/remove trailing semicolons
• Quotes: single or double

Tips:
• Supports ES6+ syntax
• Supports JSX/TSX
• Does not change code logic
tool.html-format.help:
Steps:
1. Paste HTML code
2. Choose indent style (spaces or tab)
3. Toggle auto-close tags
4. Click execute

Parameters:
• Indent: 2 or 4 spaces, or tab
• Auto-close: close unclosed HTML tags
• Attributes per line: each attribute on its own line

Tips:
• Supports all HTML5 tags
• Embedded CSS and JS are also formatted
tool.cron-gen.help:
Steps:
1. Select frequency (every minute/hour/day/week/month)
2. Set specific time parameters
3. Preview the Cron expression
4. View next execution times
5. Copy expression

Parameters:
• Second: 0-59
• Minute: 0-59
• Hour: 0-23
• Day: 1-31
• Month: 1-12
• Weekday: 0-7 (0 and 7 = Sunday)

Tips:
• Supports standard Cron and Quartz formats
• Live preview of next 5 executions
tool.cron-parser.help:
Steps:
1. Paste Cron expression
2. View natural language description
3. View next execution times

Parameters:
• Input: standard Cron expression (5 or 6 fields)
• Timezone: timezone for interpretation

Tips:
• Supports standard Cron and Quartz
• Shows next 10 execution times
• Auto-detects expression errors
tool.url-parser.help:
Steps:
1. Paste a complete URL
2. View parsed components
3. Edit parts to reconstruct URL

Parameters:
• Protocol: http, https, etc.
• Hostname: domain or IP
• Port: service port
• Path: resource path
• Query: key-value parameters
• Hash: anchor fragment

Tips:
• Query parameters shown as a table
• Auto-decodes URL-encoded characters
tool.base-converter.help:
Steps:
1. Enter the number to convert
2. Select the input base
3. View results in other bases

Parameters:
• Input base: original number's base (2-36)
• Common: binary(2), octal(8), decimal(10), hex(16)

Tips:
• Supports any base from 2 to 36
• Hex letters are case-insensitive
• Lossless for large numbers
tool.lorem-gen.help:
Steps:
1. Select unit (paragraphs/sentences/words)
2. Set quantity
3. Toggle "Lorem ipsum" opening
4. Click execute

Parameters:
• Unit: paragraphs, sentences, or words
• Quantity: how many to generate
• Fixed opening: start with classic Lorem ipsum

Tips:
• Placeholder text only — no real meaning
• Useful for layout and design testing
tool.csv-to-excel.help:
Steps:
1. Upload CSV file or paste CSV text
2. Choose delimiter and encoding
3. Click execute
4. Download Excel file

Parameters:
• Delimiter: column separator
• Encoding: character encoding (UTF-8, GBK)
• Sheet name: name for the Excel worksheet

Tips:
• Supports .csv and .tsv
• Auto-detects data types (numbers, dates)
• Choose correct encoding for non-ASCII text
tool.excel-to-csv.help:
Steps:
1. Upload Excel file
2. Select worksheet to export
3. Choose delimiter and encoding
4. Click execute
5. Download CSV file

Parameters:
• Worksheet: which sheet to export
• Delimiter: output column separator
• Encoding: output character encoding

Tips:
• Supports .xlsx and .xls
• Formula cells output computed values
tool.yaml-to-json.help:
Steps:
1. Paste YAML text
2. Choose JSON indent spaces
3. Click execute
4. Copy generated JSON

Parameters:
• Indent: JSON output spaces (2 or 4)
• Sort keys: alphabetize object keys

Tips:
• Input must be valid YAML
• YAML anchors are expanded
• Supports multi-document YAML (---)
tool.xml-to-json.help:
Steps:
1. Paste XML text
2. Choose attribute handling
3. Choose JSON indent spaces
4. Click execute

Parameters:
• Attributes: keep as JSON fields or ignore
• Indent: JSON output spaces
• Array mode: auto-convert repeated elements to arrays

Tips:
• Input must be valid XML
• XML namespaces are preserved
• CDATA content is extracted as text
tool.audio-convert.help:
Steps:
1. Upload audio file
2. Select target format
3. Optionally adjust bitrate and sample rate
4. Click execute
5. Download converted audio

Parameters:
• Format: MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC, AAC, etc.
• Bitrate: audio quality (128/192/320 kbps)
• Sample rate: frequency (44100/48000 Hz)

Tips:
• Supports conversion between common formats
• Higher bitrate = better quality, larger file
• Lossless formats (FLAC/WAV) preserve quality
tool.audio-trim.help:
Steps:
1. Upload audio file
2. Select start and end time on waveform
3. Preview selected segment
4. Click execute
5. Download trimmed audio

Parameters:
• Start time: beginning of segment
• End time: end of segment
• Fade in/out: gradual volume transition

Tips:
• Supports MP3, WAV, OGG, and more
• Waveform for precise positioning
• Fade in/out avoids abrupt cuts
tool.unit-converter.help:
Convert between different units of measurement across 6 categories.

Steps:
1. Select category
2. Enter value
3. Choose units
4. Click execute

Tips:
— Temperature supports Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin
— Results rounded to 6 decimal places
tool.barcode-gen.desc: Generate barcodes in various formats (Code128, Code39, EAN13, EAN8, UPC-A, ITF-14)
tool.barcode-gen.help:
Generate barcodes in various formats (Code128, Code39, EAN13, EAN8, UPC-A, ITF-14).

Steps:
1. Enter barcode content
2. Select barcode format
3. Adjust line width, height, and other options
4. Click execute
5. Download the barcode image

Parameters:
- Content: text or number to encode
- Format: barcode type (CODE128 supports all ASCII)
- Line Width: width of each bar (1-4 px)
- Height: barcode height (30-200 px)
- Display Value: show content text below barcode
- Font Size: size of the display text
- Background: barcode background color
- Line Color: barcode bar color

Notes:
- EAN13 requires 12-13 digits
- EAN8 requires 7-8 digits
- UPC-A requires 11-12 digits
- ITF-14 requires 13-14 digits
- CODE39 supports uppercase letters, digits, and - . $ / + % SPACE

feedback.placeholder: Optional: leave your suggestion or comment...
crop.drag_hint: Drag to move, scroll/slider to zoom

tool.code-minify.desc: Minify HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code
tool.user-agent-parser.desc: Parse User-Agent strings to identify browser, OS, and device info
tool.json-schema-validate.desc: Validate JSON data against a JSON Schema

openapi.title: API Title
tool.color-palette.desc: Generate color palettes with accessibility contrast info
tool.svg-optimize.desc: Optimize SVG files by removing metadata and unnecessary attributes
tool.video-thumbnail.desc: Extract a frame from video at a specified timestamp
tool.image-compare.desc: Compare two images side by side or with overlay difference
tool.gif-maker.desc: Create GIF from images or convert video clip to GIF

tool.ssl-checker.desc: Check SSL/TLS certificate details for a domain
tool.font-preview.desc: Preview text with different font styles

auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_favorites: No favorites yet, click ❤️ on homepage to add
dashboard.login_hint: Login to sync favorites and history across devices.
dashboard.revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this API Key?
dashboard.clear_history_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history?

opt.key_placeholder: Key (auto-generated for encrypt, required for decrypt)
dashboard.key_viewable_hint: Only keys created this session can be viewed
tool.ip-lookup.desc: Look up IP address geolocation and network info
tool.ip-lookup.help:
Function: Look up IP address geolocation, ISP, and network type.

Steps:
1. Enter IP address (leave empty to check your own IP)
2. Click execute
3. View results

Notes:
- Supports IPv4 and IPv6
- Leave empty to auto-detect your IP
- Data from ip-api.com
tool.ascii-art.desc: Generate ASCII art from text using figlet
tool.ascii-art.help:
Function: Convert text into ASCII character art.

Steps:
1. Enter text to convert
2. Choose a font style
3. Click execute
4. Copy or download the generated art

Notes:
- Supports multiple font styles (Standard, Slant, Banner, etc.)
- Max 200 characters
tool.word-cloud.desc: Generate word cloud SVG from text
tool.word-cloud.help:
Function: Input large text to automatically extract keywords and generate a word cloud.

Steps:
1. Enter text content (min 10 characters)
2. Optionally set max words and image dimensions
3. Click execute
4. Download the generated SVG word cloud

Notes:
- Auto-filters common stop words
- Higher word frequency = larger font
- Output is SVG vector format
tool.pomodoro.help:
Function: Use the Pomodoro Technique to improve focus.

Steps:
1. Click start (default 25-min work session)
2. Auto-switches to break when work ends
3. Start next pomodoro after break
4. Customize work and break durations

Notes:
- Sound notification on completion
- Tracks completed pomodoro count
- Customizable durations
tool.business-card.desc: Fill in info to generate a digital business card
tool.business-card.help:
Function: Fill in personal information to generate a business card image.

Steps:
1. Choose a template style
2. Fill in name, title, company, etc.
3. Click preview to see the result
4. Click download PNG when satisfied

Notes:
- 4 template styles available
- Outputs high-res PNG image
tool.image-add-text.desc: Add text overlay to an image
tool.image-add-text.help:
Function: Upload an image and add text overlay.

Steps:
1. Upload image
2. Enter text to add
3. Set font size, color, and position
4. Optionally set rotation angle
5. Click execute
6. Download the composited image

Notes:
- Percentage-based positioning
- Supports text rotation
- Output in PNG format
